issues.description: The translation uses nested parentheses '宽专家并行（Wide Expert Parallelism (WideEP)）', which is visually cluttered and grammatically awkward in Chinese.
issues.why_it_matters: Nested parentheses disrupt the reading flow and look unprofessional in formal tech articles.
issues.suggestion: Change to '宽专家并行（Wide Expert Parallelism, WideEP）'.

issues.description: The term 'SKU' is annotated with '(库存单位/型号)'.
issues.why_it_matters: The target audience (AI researchers, GPU engineers, hardware investors) is highly familiar with the term 'SKU'. Adding a basic e-commerce/retail annotation dilutes the hardcore engineering tone and feels condescending to the reader.
issues.suggestion: Remove the annotation and simply use 'GPU SKU'.

issues.description: Missing a space between the Latin alphanumeric string 'NVL72' and the Chinese characters '机架级系统'.
issues.why_it_matters: Proper CJK-Latin spacing is a standard typographical convention in high-quality tech publishing.
issues.suggestion: Change 'GB300 NVL72机架级系统' to 'GB300 NVL72 机架级系统'.

issues.original_text: builds on the foundation established by InferenceMAXv1
issues.description: The translation '在 InferenceMAXv1 奠定的基础上构建' carries a slight translationese flavor due to the passive/stiff structure.
issues.why_it_matters: Smoothing out the opening sentence sets a stronger, more native tone for the rest of the piece.
issues.suggestion: Change to '基于 InferenceMAXv1 奠定的基础打造' or '建立在 InferenceMAXv1 奠定的基础之上'.
